description: Canonical optimization targets for governed agents. This is the external reference point for meta/* criterion verification. Populate this file with your agent IDs and their canonical targets before deploying meta/*.
notes: Add agents as keys with canonical_target, constitutional_clause, and acceptable_drift_threshold. Agent IDs are arbitrary strings — use whatever identifiers your system employs. Example format: { "my-agent": { "canonical_target": "...", "constitutional_clause": "...", "acceptable_drift_threshold": 0.15 } }
